reviewed_items.reviewer_notes: All gates passed. Gate 3 (Code Verification): The code reading is factually correct - validateDataColumnSidecarsByRangeRequest (line 124-144) lacks the MIN_EPOCHS_FOR_DATA_COLUMN_SIDECARS_REQUESTS check that is present in the byRoot handler (dataColumnSidecarsByRoot.ts lines 18-23). The TODO at line 134 explicitly confirms this missing validation. Gate 5 (Spec Cross-Reference): The 01e property from 01e_PARTIAL_W2B3_1771748669.json (lines 516-531) requires 'data_column_sidecars_by_range must reject requests outside data_column_serve_range' with assertion 'forall req: req.range outside serve_range => response == ResourceUnavailable'. The code does not enforce this requirement. An attacker can trigger this via P2P by sending DataColumnSidecarsByRange requests with startSlot from epochs older than currentEpoch - MIN_EPOCHS_FOR_DATA_COLUMN_SIDECARS_REQUESTS, causing the handler to process the request and perform unnecessary DB queries instead of rejecting with RESOURCE_UNAVAILABLE. Severity: Medium is appropriate - this causes resource waste and violates the spec requirement that peers MUST support only the serve range window, but does not cause network splits or slashing.
reviewed_items.spec_reference: data_column_sidecars_by_range must reject requests outside data_column_serve_range. (assertion: forall req: req.range outside serve_range => response == ResourceUnavailable)
